hooks.command: b="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/bin/memory-to-repo"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*|Windows*) exec "$b.exe" pre-tool-use;; Linux) exec "$b" pre-tool-use;; *) exit 0;; esac
b="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/bin/memory-to-repo"; case "$(uname -s 2>/dev/null)" in MINGW*|MSYS*|CYGWIN*|Windows*) exec "$b.exe" session-start;; Linux) exec "$b" session-start;; *) exit 0;; esac
